TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Saiku Itiniay i Zhuoxi Cen no Hualien ko Saiku a niyaro', 128 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 493 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 475 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 18 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun89%, Tayal1%, Truku1%, roma4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: saiko~u~u itiniaj i *ħo~u~uo~uxi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u saiko~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, tajaɾ*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Saiku Itiniay i Zhuoxi Cen no Hualien ko Saiku a niyaro', 128 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 493 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 475 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 18 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun89%, Tayal1%, Truku1%, roma4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: saiko~u~u itiniaj i *ħo~u~uo~uxi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u saiko~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, tajaɾ*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
